name: Caesar Cipher
description: Implement Caesar cipher encryption and decryption. The encrypt function shifts each letter forward by the given amount, wrapping around from z to a. The decrypt function reverses the process. Non-alphabetic characters are preserved unchanged. Both uppercase and lowercase letters should be handled, preserving their case.
signature:
def caesar_encrypt(text: str, shift: int) -> str:
def caesar_decrypt(text: str, shift: int) -> str:
tests:
def test_encrypt_preserves_non_alpha():
    assert caesar_encrypt('hello, world!', 5) == 'mjqqt, btwqi!'

def test_decrypt_reverses_encrypt():
    assert caesar_decrypt(caesar_encrypt('Hello World', 7), 7) == 'Hello World'
